subcodes.first_line: O Amin! The Manifest Book maketh mention of thee from the presence of God, the Lord of the worlds, that thou mayest rejoice and render thanks unto thy Lord, the Mighty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امین یذکرک الکتاب المبین من لدی الله رب العالمین لتفرح و تشکر ربک العزیز
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @wisdom [hikmat]
